ksa_text: Ability to communicate risk assessment findings, risk status, and mitigation strategies to executive leadership and board-level audiences in business impact language.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the ability carries executive or organizational-authority signals ('board.level') that place it above the Model Governance Analyst level. STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary). RSK practitioners implement and execute within frameworks they do not unilaterally establish at the enterprise level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 1 match(es) in RSK job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Model Governance Analyst.
